scripts.build: pnpm run generate:tokens && mkdir -p dist .cache/go-build .cache/go-mod && GOCACHE="$(pwd)/.cache/go-build" GOMODCACHE="$(pwd)/.cache/go-mod" go build -buildvcs=false -o dist/weave ./cmd/weave
scripts.test: pnpm run generate:tokens && mkdir -p .cache/go-build .cache/go-mod && GOCACHE="$(pwd)/.cache/go-build" GOMODCACHE="$(pwd)/.cache/go-mod" go test ./...
scripts.lint: pnpm run generate:tokens && mkdir -p .cache/go-build .cache/go-mod && GOCACHE="$(pwd)/.cache/go-build" GOMODCACHE="$(pwd)/.cache/go-mod" go vet ./...
scripts.check-types: pnpm run generate:tokens && mkdir -p .cache/go-build .cache/go-mod && GOCACHE="$(pwd)/.cache/go-build" GOMODCACHE="$(pwd)/.cache/go-mod" go build -buildvcs=false ./...
